chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI IInd Appeal No. 237 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh case 1.For order on MA No.6785/23 2.For order on MA No.6786/23 3.For hearing of main case 30.09.2025 Mr. Ashfaq Ahmed, advocate a/w appellant ---------- Counsel for appellant does not wish to press this IInd Appeal which is dismissed as withdrawn along with pending applications.
